data_source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback
update_mode: large universe, capped Tiingo requests per run, capped new full-history downloads, cached data used when request cap or Tiingo 429 occurs
strategy_version: Eason Master US Market Monitor Cloud Sync v4.0 large-universe-cache-safe

rule_engine.note: Samples below minimum are reported but should not be used as primary buy evidence.
